title: Tactical Control Room Assets
wikitext:
[]: Tactical Control Room Assets             Quote Post by nnoby » Sun Apr 08, 2018 10:19 am The maps used here are extremely complicated and detailed, surely they weren't hand drawn. Was CG used? If so how? What programs were used? Was it printed and copied onto the cel or overlayed digitally? How could I recreate this? Where should I go for more information? In depth answers are appreciated (images in spoilers) SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Tactical Control Room Assets             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Apr 08, 2018 8:32 pm The storyboards make reference to Macs when digital assets are required, but nothing so specific as a program. Maybe look into what kinds of CAD programs were available for the Mac in the mid 90s. Sorry I can't be any more helpful than that.

[]: Re: Tactical Control Room Assets             Quote Post by nnoby » Mon Apr 09, 2018 12:58 pm Thank you Is there an easy rescource where I can see all the storyboards? I’m curious how they compare to the finished graphics.
